## FileTree.IFileTreeFileItem.setRawContents() method

Sets the raw contents of the file.

**Signature:**

```typescript
setRawContents(contents: string): Result<string>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>

contents

string

The string contents to save.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Result&lt;string&gt;

`Success` if the file was saved, or `Failure` with an error message.

## Remarks

This method is optional. If not present, the file is not mutable.
